hero.title: Driving Africa's Supply Chain Transformation
hero.description: AISCR is a Pan-African institute advancing research, education, and innovation in supply chain management — building stronger systems for a resilient and prosperous continent.

section2.title: Redefining Africa's Supply Chain Future.
section2.description: Founded in 2019, the African Institute for Supply Chain Research (AISCR) is a non-profit organization dedicated to building capacity, advancing knowledge, and shaping the next generation of supply chain leaders across Africa. We connect research, education, and enterprise to unlock Africa's economic potential.

research.title: Applied Research
research.description: Data-driven insights for smarter policy and strategy.

education.title: Education & Training
education.description: Empowering professionals and institutions through capacity building.

partnerships.title: Partnerships
partnerships.description: Collaborating with governments, universities, and the private sector.

section3.title: Featured Programs & Initiatives
section3.description: Through targeted programs and partnerships, AISCR delivers research-driven initiatives that transform supply chain systems in Africa.

leadership.title: Africa Supply Chain Leadership Program
leadership.description: Preparing the next generation of supply chain leaders through high-impact training and mentorship.

research.title: Research Grants for Innovation
research.description: Funding research that drives policy reform, operational efficiency, and sustainable transformation.

conference.title: Pan-African Supply Chain Conference
conference.description: Connecting experts, institutions, and decision-makers to shape Africa's supply chain agenda.

section4.title: Your Contribution Drives Change.
section4.description: Every contribution, big or small fuels research, empowers professionals, and accelerates Africa's journey toward supply chain excellence.

educate.title: Educate
educate.description: Support a student, sponsor a training, or empower a future leader.

fund_research.title: Fund Research
fund_research.description: Enable groundbreaking studies that influence policy and unlock systemic improvements.

scale_impact.title: Scale Impact
scale_impact.description: Help us bring our programs to more countries, more communities, and more institutions.

section5.title: Real Stories. Real Transformation.
section5.description: Hear from the researchers, professionals, and partners whose lives and institutions have been transformed through AISCR's initiatives.

t1.quote: AISCR completely changed how I approach supply chain challenges. The research tools and network they provide are unmatched on the continent.
t1.name: Sophia Moore

t2.quote: Thanks to AISCR's training programs, our team now operates with a level of efficiency we never thought possible. A game-changer for African businesses.
t2.name: James Okafor

t3.quote: The Pan-African Supply Chain Conference opened doors I didn't even know existed. I connected with partners across 10 countries in one weekend.
t3.name: Amina Diallo

t4.quote: AISCR's research grants allowed our university to publish findings that are now shaping national supply chain policy.
t4.name: Dr. Emmanuel Tetteh

t5.quote: The mentorship program gave me the confidence and skills to launch my own consultancy. I now employ 12 people across two countries.
t5.name: Fatima Al-Rashid

section5_2.title: Together, We Build a
section5_2.description: Our work is strengthened by collaboration with governments, universities, development partners, and the private sector.
